scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost drizzle-kit push --force'
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx migrate.ts'
scripts.db:baseline:dev: pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx baseline.ts'
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx src/db/seed.ts ../../sample.kif'
